basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates up to 30 years of age holding a B.Tech/ B.E., M.Tech/ M.E., or M.Sc. in the relevant disciplines are eligible to apply through email on or before 31 July 2026. Preference will be given to candidates with a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET/ GPAT/ DST-Inspire Fellowship. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: As per norms and guidelines of the Institute

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E or M.Tech/M.E in Chemical/Mechanical/Metallurgy/Petrochemical/Petroleum/Nanotechnology/Instrumentation/EEE/Electrochemical/Chemical Technology/Polymer/Energy/Environmental Engineering, M.Sc in Chemistry/Physics/Material Science/Environmental Science/Polymer Science/Nanotechnology and allied areas
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent in Chemical/Mechanical/Metallurgy/Petrochemical/Petroleum/Nanotechnology/Instrumentation/EEE/Electrochemical/Chemical Technology/Polymer/Energy/Environmental Engineering and allied disciplines and M.Tech/M.E in relevant areas OR B.Tech/B.E in above disciplines OR M.Sc in Chemistry/Physics/Material Science/Environmental Science/Polymer Science/Nanotechnology and allied areas. GATE/CSIR/UGC NET/GPAT/DST-Inspire preferred.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Warangal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. GATE/CSIR/UGC NET/GPAT/DST-Inspire preferred.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal is 31st July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech/B.E or M.Tech/M.E in specific engineering disciplines, or an M.Sc in relevant science subjects. GATE/CSIR/UGC NET/GPAT/DST-Inspire qualifications are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the institute's norms and guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which may be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The most critical date to remember is the last date to apply, which is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal).

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal is a contractual role.
